message:
perf: complete parking_lot lock migration and flatten lock-chain ergonomics

Continue the systematic migration from std::sync::{Mutex,RwLock} to
parking_lot equivalents across the remaining subsystems. This is the
final sweep covering modules that were either missed in the earlier
per-subsystem commits or that only needed formatting cleanup after
the initial migration landed.

Concrete changes per area:

- channel/partition: migrate PartitionController from std Mutex to
  parking_lot Mutex, removing all .expect("partition lock poisoned")
  and collapsing if-let-Ok patterns into direct lock() calls
- channel/broadcast, mpsc, watch: flatten multi-line lock-chain
  expressions (e.g. self.channel.inner.lock().sender_count += 1)
  now that parking_lot's non-poisoning API makes them single-line
- combinator/{bracket,bulkhead,circuit_breaker,rate_limit}: migrate
  RwLock sites (bulkhead queue, circuit breaker state, rate limiter
  windows) and update test helpers from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot
- epoch: migrate EpochBarrier and EpochClock from std RwLock to
  parking_lot RwLock, removing ~20 .expect("lock poisoned") sites
- evidence_sink, plan/fixtures: import reorder for parking_lot
- grpc/health: migrate HealthService status map from std RwLock
- http/h1/http_client: import reorder for parking_lot
- lab/network/harness: migrate VirtualNetworkRuntime outbox and
  pending results from std Mutex, removing .unwrap() on lock()
- net/dns/cache: migrate DnsCache from std RwLock, removing all
  .expect("cache lock poisoned") calls
- net/tcp/{socket,split}, net/unix/listener: parking_lot formatting
- observability/{collector,otel}: parking_lot formatting cleanup
- record/region: migrate RegionRecord inner from std RwLock, removing
  ~30 .expect("lock poisoned") sites across all accessor methods
- record/finalizer: update test code from std::sync::Mutex
- record/symbolic_obligation: parking_lot migration
- runtime/{io_driver,reactor/lab,reactor/registration}: formatting
- runtime/scheduler/{priority,three_lane}: parking_lot formatting
- runtime/waker: formatting cleanup
- server/connection, service/{layer,rate_limit}: formatting cleanup
- time/{driver,sleep}: formatting cleanup
- trace/{buffer,crashpack}: parking_lot formatting
- trace/distributed/{collector,vclock}: parking_lot formatting
- transport/{aggregator,mod,router,sink,stream}: parking_lot migration
  and formatting cleanup
- types/{resource,symbol_set}: parking_lot formatting
- cancel/symbol_cancel: import reorder, flatten map_or_else chain

This eliminates all remaining lock-poisoning error paths in the
codebase, completing the migration started in commits 5365f6b..1b89f16.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
